name: spark-hermes-showcase
description: Remotion showcase video for Spark — tracking Hermes stats & chats

scripts.render:agent: remotion render HermesAgent out/hermes-agent.raw.mp4 --concurrency=4 && npm run normalize:agent
scripts.normalize:agent: ffmpeg -y -i out/hermes-agent.raw.mp4 -c:v copy -af loudnorm=I=-16:TP=-1.5:LRA=11 -c:a aac -b:a 256k out/hermes-agent.mp4 && rm -f out/hermes-agent.raw.mp4
